description.zh: 通过 ToolPkg.readResource + Java.loadJar 载入内置 apktool runtime，并通过 child-first 包前缀隔离宿主依赖冲突后直接调用 brut.androlib.* 类。
description.en: Load the bundled apktool runtime through ToolPkg.readResource + Java.loadJar, isolate host dependency conflicts with child-first package prefixes, then directly call brut.androlib.* classes.
